hero.title: Products & Projects
hero.description: Five bootstrapped internet products built over 20 years. Each is a working business, not a startup pitch.

projects.name: clickfraud.ru
projects.summary: Click fraud protection for Russian advertisers. Machine learning + behavioral analysis.
projects.tagline: Click fraud protection for Russian advertisers
projects.description: Detects and blocks invalid clicks on contextual advertising. Protects budgets from competitor bots, click farms, and automated fraud using machine learning and behavioral signals. Received an 8M RUB state grant from the Foundation for Innovation Assistance.

projects.name: xmldatafeed.com
projects.summary: Web scraping and price monitoring at scale. 20M+ RUB/year revenue.
projects.tagline: Web scraping and price monitoring at scale
projects.description: Automated collection of pricing data, product catalogs, and competitor information. Built for e-commerce operators who need clean, structured data without building their own infrastructure. Revenue reached 20M+ RUB/year. Only public data is collected.

projects.name: offlinecrm.ru
projects.summary: Simple free CRM for small businesses. No enterprise complexity required.
projects.tagline: Simple free CRM for small teams
projects.description: A no-frills CRM designed for small businesses that don't need enterprise complexity. Free to use. Focused on contact management, deals, and basic workflow tracking. Bootstrapped growth through organic and content marketing.

projects.name: tapki.com
projects.tagline: Product search engine powered by Elasticsearch
projects.description: A search and discovery engine for products and catalogs. Built on Elasticsearch, optimized for large-scale product databases with fast full-text search and filtering. Engineering thinking applied to catalog infrastructure.

projects.name: notissimus.com
projects.description: A small development studio focused on mobile applications. Builds and maintains apps for B2B clients. Part of the broader ecosystem, providing development capacity for product experiments.

intro.description: Open-source software and commercial tooling from practical engineering constraints: reliable, observable, and maintainable.
